summary: Comprehensive testing of new MACTech Oto Galeri CRM features: Interactive Vehicle Damage Diagram, Document Management, and Calculation Tools. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint returns 200
Backend: Create car with documents field - documents saved correctly
Backend: Create car with expertise field - 13 body parts + 3 mechanical parts saved
Backend: GET cars returns documents and expertise data intact
Backend: PUT car updates documents (added muayene, ekspertiz)
Backend: PUT car updates expertise (changed kaput from orijinal to boyali)
Backend: PATCH car updates expertise only (kaput to degisen, motor to Değişmiş)
Backend: All 6 document categories present (ruhsat, muayene, sigorta, ekspertiz, vekaletname, diger)
Backend: All 13 body parts present in expertise
Backend: Delete car works correctly
Frontend: Login with demo@mactech.com works
Frontend: Dashboard loads after login
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Hesaplama Araçları' menu item
Frontend: Calculations page shows all 7 modules (Satış Fiyatı Simülasyonu, Taksit, Kredi, KDV, İndirim, Kur Etkisi, Kar/Zarar)
Frontend: Taksit Hesaplama form works - inputs accept values
Frontend: Kar/Zarar Hesaplama form works - inputs accept values
Frontend: AddCarModal opens with quick-add-car button
Frontend: AddCarModal has 5 tabs (Genel Bilgiler, Ekspertiz, Fotoğraflar, Belgeler, Sahiplik/Konsinye)
Frontend: Ekspertiz tab shows interactive car damage diagram
Frontend: Diagram has all 13 body parts (kaput, tavan, bagaj, tamponlar, kapılar, çamurluklar)
Frontend: Clicking diagram part changes status (ORJ → BOY → DEĞ → LOK cycle)
Frontend: Belgeler tab shows all 6 document categories with upload buttons
Frontend: Each document category has 'Yükle' button for file upload
critical_code_review_comments: CarExpertiseDiagram.jsx: Well-implemented interactive SVG diagram with 13 body parts and 4 status states (orijinal/boyali/degisen/lokal)
AddCarModal.jsx: DocumentCategory component properly handles file uploads with 50MB limit check
CalculationsPage.jsx: All 7 calculation modules implemented with proper Turkish number formatting
models.py: documents field correctly defined with 6 categories as default dict
Sidebar.jsx: calculations menu item properly added with Calculator icon and correct permissions

test_credentials.note: User updated with active trial subscription for testing

seed_data_creation: Updated demo@mactech.com user with active trial subscription (trial_end: 14 days from now)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features are working correctly: 1) Interactive damage diagram in Ekspertiz tab with 13 clickable body parts that cycle through 4 states (Orijinal→Boyalı→Değişen→Lokal), 2) Belgeler tab with 6 document categories (Ruhsat, Muayene, Sigorta, Ekspertiz, Vekaletname, Diğer) each with upload functionality, 3) Hesaplama Araçları page accessible from sidebar with 7 calculation modules. Backend properly saves and retrieves documents and expertise data. Test user demo@mactech.com has active subscription.
